title: chrysanthemum zawadzkii subsp. lucidum
intro: Chrysanthemum zawadzkii subsp. lucidum, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum or clear-leaf chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum zawadzkii subsp. lucidum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and sore throats, and promoting digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Chrysanthemum zawadzkii subsp. lucidum is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements.
